name: Gopher
notes: Reviewed overlay for SN42 using the live Gopher developer portal, subnet documentation, miner documentation, and source repository. Native chain identity currently reports a placeholder name, so this remains an explicit identity-drift entry rather than a silent rename.

gap_notes: Native chain name currently reports as a placeholder.
Official developer portal, subnet docs, miner docs, and source repository are verified live.

OpenAPI confirmed absent: checked developers.gopher-ai.com/openapi.json (404), api.gopher-ai.com (connection refused), and all /docs/index-API/* paths (404). No machine-readable schema surface exists as of 2026-06-26. Close issue #1284.
Public subnet API confirmed absent: api.gopher-ai.com is connection refused, data.gopher-ai.com is 403 (auth required). No auth-free public API endpoint found as of 2026-06-26. Close issue #1284.

Candidate data artifact found: developers.gopher-ai.com/llms.txt is a public, machine-readable documentation index published by the official Gopher developer portal. Eligible for a data-artifact candidate submission.

surfaces.notes: Public Gopher subnet documentation. The docs identify the subnet as mainnet netuid 42 and link miner setup to the subnet source repository.

surfaces.notes: Official Gopher miner documentation for Subnet 42.
